rules.rule_text:
rule wp_shell_crew
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "http://www.emc.com/collateral/white-papers/h12756-wp-shell-crew.pdf"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "1/29/2014"

	strings:
		$mz = { 4d 5a }
		$s1 = "IsWow64Process"
		$s2 = "svchost.exe -k netsvcs"
		$s3 = "Services\\%s\\Parameters"
		$s4 = "%s %s %s"
		$s5 = "-%s-%03d"
		$s6 = "127.0.0.1"
		$s7 = "\\temp\\" fullword

	condition:
		($mz at 0 ) and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
